<<code language="ocaml" | sig
  val hcf :
    ?a:[< Html_types.div_attrib ] Eliom.Content.Html.attrib list ->
    ?header:[< Html_types.header_content_fun ] Eliom.Content.Html.elt list ->
    ?footer:[< Html_types.footer_content_fun ] Eliom.Content.Html.elt list ->
    [< Html_types.div_content ] Eliom.Content.Html.elt list ->
    [> `Section ] Eliom.Content.Html.elt
  val popup :
    ?a:[< Html_types.div_attrib ] Eliom.Content.Html.attrib list ->
    ?enable_scrolling_hack:bool ->
    ?close_button:Html_types.button_content Eliom.Content.Html.elt list ->
    ?confirmation_onclose:(unit -> bool Lwt.t) ->
    ?onclose:(unit -> unit Lwt.t) ->
    ?close_on_background_click:bool ->
    ?close_on_escape:bool ->
    ((unit -> unit Lwt.t) ->
     [< Html_types.div_content ] Eliom.Content.Html.elt Lwt.t) ->
    [> `Div ] Eliom.Content.Html.elt Lwt.t
  val ask_question :
    ?a:[< Html_types.div_attrib ] Eliom.Content.Html.attrib list ->
    ?a_hcf:[< Html_types.div_attrib ] Eliom.Content.Html.attrib list ->
    header:[< Html_types.header_content ] Eliom.Content.Html.elt list ->
    buttons:([< Html_types.button_content_fun ] Eliom.Content.Html.elt list *
             (unit -> 'a Lwt.t) * string list)
            list ->
    [< Html_types.div_content ] Eliom.Content.Html.elt list -> 'a Lwt.t
  val confirm :
    ?a:[< Html_types.div_attrib ] Eliom.Content.Html.attrib list ->
    [< Html_types.header_content_fun ] Eliom.Content.Html.elt list ->
    ([< Html_types.button_content_fun ] as 'a) Eliom.Content.Html.elt list ->
    'a Eliom.Content.Html.elt list -> bool Lwt.t
  val enable_page_scroll : unit -> unit
  val disable_page_scroll : unit -> unit
end >>
